title: Trump Says U.S. and Qatar Not Involved in Strike on Iran’s South Pars Gas Field
summary_full: President Trump said Israel was responsible for the attack, but vowed to “massively” destroy the gas field if Tehran hit Qatar’s energy facilities in retaliation.
summary_public: President Trump said Israel was responsible for the attack, but vowed to “massively” destroy the gas field if Tehran hit Qatar’s energy facilities in retaliation.

IL.label: neutral
